purpose: Source-lock DM1/V1 champion inventory mouth and eye click routing to ReDMCSB COMMAND.C/PANEL.C, then verify Firestaff routes viewport-relative C545/C546 zones to C070/C071 without disturbing slot-box/action-hand routing.

sourceRanges.why: absolute S10 inventory mouse rows show action hand C029, mouth C070 at 56..71/46..61, and eye C071 at 12..27/46..61
G0449 source routes action hand C508 then mouth C545 and eye C546 as viewport-relative rows before quiver C514
command dispatcher sends C070 to F0349 and C071 to F0352
F0349 mouth handler opens pressing state and validates G4055 leader-hand object against MASK0x0001_MOUTH
F0349 removes/animates mouth icon via C545 and refreshes champion state
F0352 eye handler draws C203/C546 and either stats or leader-hand object description
Firestaff mouse route bridge gives C545/C546 the ReDMCSB 16x16 viewport-relative mouth/eye rectangles (COMMAND.C y=46 minus viewport y=33) (COMMAND.C y=46 minus viewport y=33)
Firestaff inventory route table inserts C070/C071 after pouch_2 and before quiver, matching COMMAND.C order
focused probe assertions for mouth/eye command and zone ids

nonClaims: This gate is a source-lock and route/probe assertion, not a runtime validation of drinking/eating/examining side effects.
This gate does not claim complete implementation of F0349/F0352 panel mutations beyond preserving their routed entry points and source citations.
